signals.headline: X Product Chief Hints at Crypto Integration | YES | MED confidence** [3]
signals.raw:
X Product Chief Hints at Crypto Integration | YES | MED confidence** [3]  
Nikita Bier, X's Head of Product and Solana advisor, teased a crypto "fix" on April 14, 2026, fueling speculation of Bitcoin or Solana ties ahead of X Money launch, a development with potential to influence adoption bets in prediction markets.[3]

signals.headline: Solana Economic Activity Hits $1
signals.raw:
Solana Economic Activity Hits $1.1 Trillion Milestone | YES | HIGH confidence** [1]  
Solana's on-chain economic activity reached $1.1 trillion on April 14, 2026, a 6,500% surge last quarter, confirming historic network adoption and bullish fundamentals that could shift prediction markets toward higher SOL price targets like $108.[1]
